strength: Excelling in {subject} — averaging {percentage}%. Keep up the great work and consider stretch material to stay challenged.
relativeStrength: {subject} is relatively the strongest subject at {percentage}%, though there's still room to grow across the board.
weakness: Needs improvement in {subject} — currently at {percentage}%. Extra practice sessions and reviewing recent material should help close the gap.
weaknessSevere: Struggling in {subject} — currently at {percentage}%. This subject needs urgent attention; consider a tutor or one-on-one review with the teacher.
